name: com.jettyd/mcp
description: Connect AI agents to IoT devices — read sensors, send commands, manage ESP32 fleets.

environmentVariables.name: JETTYD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your jettyd API key from api.jettyd.com

packages.installationInstructions: Set JETTYD_API_KEY to your jettyd API key, then run: npx @jettyd/mcp
